name: @openparachute/meeting-mcp
description: Meeting MCP — a READ-only backed Parachute surface that reads #capture/meeting notes from a vault and projects them as an end-user-friendly MCP tool set + REST (recent-meetings, search-meetings, meeting). The reusable template for the "custom MCP over a vault" pattern. Composes downstream of an ingest surface (meeting-ingest WRITES #capture/meeting; this READS it).
